name: Privilege Dropping / Lowering Errors
description: The product does not drop privileges before passing control of a resource to an actor that does not have those privileges. This spreads elevated privileges throughout the system, allowing less-privileged actors to perform operations with superuser-level access.
detection_pattern: Look for AUTH nodes (elevated privileges, root/admin context) that flow through CONTROL or TRANSFORM nodes (resource handoff, process spawn, file creation) to EXTERNAL nodes (less-privileged user, child process, downstream service) without a CONTROL mediator (privilege drop, setuid call, capability restriction) that reduces the privilege level before the handoff.
